articles.title: Bot protection update
articles.desc: The bot protection has been updated to prevent clicks to be recorded on URLs in sent emails when a bot verifies them.

articles.title: Manual test emails
articles.desc: Users allowed to build campaigns but not allowed to access users can now send tests to manually typed addresses.

articles.title: Gmail preview text
articles.desc: The preview text on the Gmail listing does not contain the email subject anymore.

splash_content.title: THE FIXES INCLUDED IN THIS VERSION

articles.title: Improved security of subscription and unsubscription
articles.desc: We reinforced the security of the subscription form and unsubscribe page to prevent modification of the confirmation status.

articles.title: URL redirection update
articles.desc: We have updated the URL redirection option for the direct unsubscribe link and the "unsubscribe from all lists" link to improve usability and ensure the redirection is handled correctly.

articles.title: Deprecated messages
articles.desc: We fixed some deprecated messages linked to the statistics to prepare for the future php versions.

articles.title: Email content replacement
articles.desc: We fixed an issue that could prevent the replacement of email content, such as articles, in some rare cases.

articles.title: Timezone issue with REST API
articles.desc: The REST API triggers (mainly used for Zapier and Make) had a timezone issue, preventing new data from being found.

articles.title: EventBooking events detection
articles.desc: [add-ons] The new EventBooking events are now detected by creation date if the publishing date is not used by the author.

articles.title: Better jDownloads links
articles.desc: [add-ons] A new option lets you specify the menu item ID to use for jDownloads links.

articles.title: Name field visibility in subscription module
articles.desc: The name field isn't shown by default anymore on subscription modules when it is not selected.
